evidence_summary: Transition the protagonist from a state of immediate survival threat within a dark cave to the overwhelming sensory experience of the Arizona desert. The scene must establish the geographical shift through extreme lighting contrast and scale.
Carter exits the cave, emerging into the bright, harsh light of the Arizona landscape, realizing he has returned to Earth.
Dread $\rightarrow$ Realization/Shock.
